name: Honey Whipped Cream-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the cream with an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
2. Gently fold in the honey and vanilla extract.
[Makes about 2 cups. Nutrients Per Serving (1/4 cup): Calories: 128 Sodium: 11.5 mg Carbohydrates: 7.39 g Protein: 0.64 g Cholesterol: 40.8 mg Dietary Fiber: 0.02 g Total Fat: 11.0 g Cal. from Fat: 76%]
